title: 2. TongTian 通໽ (88.03) and TongWei 通胃(88.10) 针通໽、通胃。
text:
TianHuang and ShenGuan may bring fairly good effect for profuse stomach acid. TongTian and TongWei are good
points too. Acid regurgitation has similar symptoms as those of stomachache, but also has reverse flow of
stomach acid. TianHuang and ShenGuan are also main points for acid regurgitation which may bring good
therapeutic effect. About herbal medicine, a lot of people like to use WuZeiGu (cuttlefish bone), ZheBei (Bulbus
Fritillariae), WaLengZi (Concha Arcae) and other herbs related to the condition. My own experience is to add
WuMei, ShanZha which are better than WuZeiGu, ZheBei and WaLengZi. Because they have the function to
astringe and soothe the liver, both treat the branch and root.
